_comment: Copy to mcp_servers.json. These are VERIFIED-REAL servers (checked on npm). 'everything' is the official reference server — great for confirming your MCP client works. 'memory' is a knowledge-graph store. 'filesystem' needs a REAL directory path that exists. Both config formats work (mcpServers object OR servers list). Tools appear as mcp__<server>__<tool>.

_more_servers_you_can_add._note: These need credentials or extra setup — uncomment into mcpServers and fill in.
